store_headline: One-Page Music WordPress Theme for Bands and DJs
store_subheadline: Multiple bold layouts for bands, DJs, and musicians — all on a single high-impact page
features: One-page scrolling design optimized for music promotion
Discography section with integrated audio players
Event listing with date and venue information
Video gallery with custom thumbnail generation
Elementor-based page builder with music elements
Product quickview for streamlined shopping experience
Playlist manager with custom audio players
Section-based navigation for smooth user experience
Dynamic content showcases with Slider Revolution
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Contact form integration for fan engagement
selling_points: One page — discography, tour dates, videos, merch, contact — in a single high-impact dark scroll
Multiple bold layout options within the one-page framework — buy once, choose the layout that fits
Dark full-screen stage photography hero with brushstroke type — not a trimmed-down full site
The dark Elementor one-page option — distinct from Zample (colorful) and Speaker (vintage) by drama and flexibility
Elementor-powered for bands and DJs who manage their own site between shows
WooCommerce merch embedded in the one-page scroll — fans don't leave the experience to buy a t-shirt
Complete artist presence that takes hours to set up, not weeks
key_benefits: Complete band or DJ presence absorbed in a single scroll
Dark stage-photography first impression puts the performance identity front and center
Showcase releases, tours, videos, and merch without a multi-page site
Buy merch without leaving the one-page scroll experience
Multiple bold layouts go beyond the single-template one-page competitors
Professional headline-act site that opens booking conversations on first impression
design_features: Music player that follows user scrolling

testimonials.text: The Notescape WordPress Theme by @Wolf-Themes is perfectly designed and has been an incredible asset for our band client! The design is absolutely awesome—clean, stylish, and visually engaging—making it ideal for showcasing the tour package, upcoming events, and selling merch. Our clients loved how professional and intuitive their new website feels, and functions. Was pretty fast to set-up. On top of that, the support from @Wolf-Themes has been responsive and efficient, making the entire experience seamless. Thank you for the fantastic work—keep it up!
testimonials.author: GINGALLEY

testimonials.text: A good theme and a wonderfuel technical support. Thank you.
testimonials.author: pozoalcon
